title: cebatha mollis
intro: Cebatha mollis, also known as Cebatha mollis plant, is a flowering plant native to Africa, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cebatha mollis plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for external use, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
